series_metadata.series_title: Inactive Military Personnel Records on Microfilm
series_metadata.series_description: A chronological history of military service of former member of the Ohio National Guard, Ohio Naval Militia and Ohio State Guard (officer, warrant officer and enlisted). The information in these records is used to respond to requests for military service information. These requests are received from all the armed services, Department of the Army agencies, Veterans Administration, Civil Service, law enforcement agencies and the individuals concerned.
